name: Chip + Birdies - Indoor Virtual Golf Club
about: Chip + Birdies is an indoor virtual golf club offering a year-round golfing experience with pro-level technology and a no-pressure environment. The facility features private bays equipped with advanced simulator technology, accommodating up to four players per bay. Pricing is structured with hourly bay rentals and bulk hour packages available for those seeking more practice time. The venue is designed for various groups including families, friends, and individuals looking to improve their game or enjoy casual play. It emphasizes a modern, accessible golf experience with zero hassle, welcoming all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TRACKMAN technology provides accurate data and analysis for improving skills
Indoor environment allows for year-round golf regardless of weather conditions
Private bays ensure a focused and comfortable playing experience for groups of up to four
Flexible pricing options including bulk hour packages for frequent players
No-pressure, fun-focused atmosphere suitable for both casual and serious practice

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service, BYOB policy not explicitly stated but not prohibited
No mention of alcohol service or bar on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as TRACKMAN Technology for ball tracking and analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own clubs as there is no mention of club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue does not have staff present and does not mention food or drink service, suggesting outside food and drink may be permissible.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, but each bay can accommodate a foursome and prices are quoted per hour, so play time depends on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue explicitly welcomes all ages, including first-timers, making it suitable for families and children.
